feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Business Partner Personnel number CDS view
entry.content:
Dears,

Please advise what CDS view can i use to extract Business Partner Personnel numbers together with Business Partner number and Name

 

Ekaterina

 

Ekaterina

entry.title: CDS View for field WBS Element Mapped to Billing Element
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like know if there is any CDS view that contains the field "wbs element ID" mapped to "Billing Element ID" in professional service.

Thanks,

Evans Aarons

entry.title: Creation of Additive Costs in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP experts,

I am looking at creating Additive Costs by selecting the option "Cost Comp Struc w/ Texts" in SAP Public cloud via the application " Create Additive costs"

Can you please guide me with the steps and the necessary configurations needed for this purpose.

The intention is to to achieve COGS Split via Additive costing since my client is not a manufacturing organization and hence no BOMs are used

Request your valuable inputs

Regards

entry.title: Set Kanban Container Status - Batch number
entry.content:
Hi SAP gurus,

we use Batch number in app Set Kanban Container Status. There are more possibilities how to add batch. It can be put manually / but we need to know batch number or we can scan it, or search it:

1. we want to scan batch number - our QR code format is SAPnumber_batch. How to define scanner for reading only batch ? For example: 123456_batch1 - we need to scan only batch1.

2. in search field for batch are displayed all batches for search material - how we can define that there are displayed only batches with stock quantity ?

Thanks for support 🙂

entry.title: print push integration (SAP_COM_0467)
entry.content:
Hi 

We are in the process of implementing external printing or OMS on S4 Public Cloud using SAP BTP print service, integration suite and CPM, but we are having an issue with the SAP_COM_0647 (Push integration) which seems to only trigger or send a notification to call a BTP integration suite endpoint when you open or refresh the Maintain Print queue app and not when there is a new queue item added. 

Regards

JP

entry.title: Saving Files in S/4HANA Cloud Public using ABAP
entry.content:
Hello, community!

I'm working on a migration project to S/4HANA Cloud Public that requires me to save files using ABAP. In the past, I've used function modules (like SO_DOCUMENT_INSERT_API1) and classes to achieve this, but I understand these are not available in the S/4HANA Cloud, embedded ABAP environment.

My goal is to be able to save, read, and delete files in a flexible manner in S/4HANA Cloud Public, embedded ABAP, similar to how we could in traditional ABAP.

Currently, I'm aware of the cl_attachment_service_api, but it seems to require files to be saved associated with a standard SAP Object Type.

Is there a way to achieve more flexible file handling capabilities in S/4HANA Cloud Public, perhaps through an alternative approach?

Any guidance would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks!

entry.title: Stock Transfer
entry.content:
{
    "PostingDate": "2024-09-25T00:00:00",
    "GoodsMovementCode": "?", // Transfer Posting
    "to_MaterialDocumentItem": [
    {
        "Plant": "GS00",
        "StorageLocation": "GS0B",
        "Material": "MPD241204BK24",
        "GoodsMovementType": "?",
        "QuantityInEntryUnit": "1",
        "IssuingOrReceivingPlant": "GS00",
        "IssuingOrReceivingStorageLoc": "GS0C"
    }
  ]
}

I want to transfer stock from Blocked Stock, Stock in Quality Inspection and Returns to Stock Transfer (Storage Location).
Which GoodsMovementCode and GoodsMovementType should I use to achieve this?

entry.title: Internal batch number not assigning while posting MIGO
entry.content:
we are unable to generate internal batch number assignment during MIGO transaction and number range has been setup in CBC.

Error message

Number range  not defined

Message no. 26023

Diagnosis

You have enter number range  for the document type, but this number
range is not defined for the number range object "document".

entry.title: MPN need to flow along with material number and MPN other requirement
entry.content:
Manufacture Part Number Requirement

Dear experts, 

Would appreciate if you can kindly help us with the following MPN requirement of my client.

Requirement of Client:

  • Client requires the MPN number in the material master. The same MPN should be reflected in all places where the Material number flows. For example, MPN should appear in BOM, stock reports, inventory reports etc.)

  • Make (manufacturer) field is required in material master and the same should flow in procurement process (for e.g.: PR, PO, GR, Service Entry sheets and invoices)
  • The explanation of client requirement is given below in 2 cases apart from the SAP best practice

SAP Best Practice

Case 1:

As per SAP best practice, manufacturer as a supplier which is like 18300080(Vendor Number)

 For e.g.: Croma, reliance digital, Amazon

Client requires the MPN numbers based on manufacturer (supplier)

For example, As per SAP:

SAP standard:

Mfr Part Number: Phone12345. (manufacturers or suppliers are, Croma, Reliance digital, Amazon etc..)

Client Requirement:

Mfr Part Number should be Phone 12345 as follows:

  1. In place of manufacturer, the supplier or vendor name should be replaced with manufacturer(Original Equipment Manufacturer-OEM) like Samsung, Nokia and Redmi etc.

SAP standard:

 

MPN

Phone12345

SUPPLIER

Manufacturer

1.CROMA

 

 

2.Reliance Digital

 

 

3.Amazon

 

 

4.Flipkart

 

 

 

 No provision in standard sap best practice

 

OEM

MAKER

1.Samsung

 

 

2.Nokia

 

 

3.Redmi

Client Requirement:

Case 1: As per client team, for supplier they are asking the additional Field as Make (Distributors)

Case 1: Normal scenario

 

 

MPN

Phone 12345

Manufacturer

1.Samsung

 

2.Nokia

 

3.Redmi

Distributor/supplier

1.CROMA

 

2.Reliance Digital

 

3.Amazon

 

4.Flipkart

Case 2 Rare case: MPN will be different, but supplier remains same, For e.g.: phone12345 – CROMA, Reliance, Amazon

Rare case

 

 

 Different MPN

MPN

 

MPN

Manufacturer

1.Samsung

Sphone12345

 

2.Nokia

NPHONE22243

 

3.Redmi

RPhone1624716

Distributor/supplier

1.CROMA

 

 

2.Reliance Digital

 

 

3.Amazon

 

 

4.Flipkart

entry.title: Reassign costs and revenues - new app without excel upload???
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I have just read that there is a new version of the ‘Reassign costs and revenues’ app (F2009 --> F2009A) and wanted to try it out straight away. I noticed that the ‘Upload Excel’ feature, which is very important for my customer, is not included in the new app, while the previous app is now marked as ‘old’ and will probably disappear soon. That can't be true, can it? Will this be added? What is the alternative way to reassign via Excel?

Thank you in advance for any hint.

Best regards

Rado

entry.title: Custom PDF attachment to JE via API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV - Conversion issue
entry.content:
Hello Community, 

We have a requirement to display and attach custom Adobe Form to Journal Entry. We have built custom Adobe form using Form Service by Adobe in BTP and created RAP application with custom action. We are using S4 HANA Public Cloud system.
 
To generate/render the PDF, we are using cl_fp_ads_util=>render_pdf which provide pdf stream data, and observed that we are getting data in Hexadecimal format.


Now, we want to attach this pdf to Journal Entry, so we are using API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV via http call. However, when we pass same pdf stream data to API, we are getting status as 200 (instead of 201 created). Since API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV accept the data in binary format (using set_binary method of http request ) we are facing challenges converting the hex data to binary and successfully attaching the file.

Could anyone guide us on how to resolve this?
Thank you in advance!!

entry.title: Report that Shows Purchase Orders that have attachments uploaded.
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there a report that shows purchase orders (approved, in-approval, etc. - preferable to include all statuses) that have at least one attachment? Perhaps there is a way to pull this through Monitor Purchase Orders or Manage Purchase Orders? Or a different application?

I am trying to easily identify what purchase orders have an attachment included without having to actually click and view every PO.

entry.title: Minimum desktop and laptop hardware requirements
entry.content:
Could you please advice Minimum desktop and laptop hardware requirements, Thanks

entry.title: Need CDS view name to fetch User name based on CB** business user ID
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

Need your help in finding the CDS view name for user name based on CB** user IDs. We want to fetch user name based on business user ID.

 

 

 

Thanks & Regards,

 

Rishi Raj


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Database restore / Cleaning activity for SAP S4HANA Public Cloud Quality and Customising Server
entry.content:
Dear Team,

we are implementing SAP S4HANA Public Cloud at one of our clients.

1. We want to clean entire data along with all masters from Customizing server or from Quality server keeping all validations, configurations as it is.

2.  Also, we want to restore Production server data along with transactions, masters and configurations to Quality server to replicate Production server on Quality server.

We would like if this activity can be possible, if yes, how?

Thanks,

Nitin

entry.title: CDS view name BP's Assigned to Partner function against supplier
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am trying to fetch the Email address from the Assigned BP for custom Partner functions defined for supplier, i have tried checking I_SupplierPartnerFunc, I_SupplierPartnerFunc_2 CDS views but the 'PersonnelNumber' field against the Partner function is blank.

Could you please help me find the right CDS view to fetch the Assigned BP for the custom partner function maintained for the supplier. please find below screenshot for your reference.

Thank you in Advance.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Intraday memo records are not automatically generate.
entry.content:
Intraday bank statement memo records are not automatically generated when Uploading an Intraday Bank Statement.

entry.title: Cannot change PO Net order value
entry.content:
User wants to change the PO net value. But couldn't edit the value.

entry.title: Acknowledgment for PO item contains date variance - turn off
entry.content:
Hello SAP experts,

is in Public Cloud possible to turn of the error: Acknowledgment for PO item contains date variance when we are creating Inbound Delivery from PO?

Thank you

#SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud

entry.title: How to get "marked for Deletion" and "Blocked Items of a Purchase Order via the API?
entry.content:
Hello!

I need to get the Purchase Order Items via the Purchase Order OData V4 SAP Public Cloud API. However, marked for deletion and blocked items aren't retrieved by the API. Or at least not in the same way as the active items.

I have found this note that describe the same issue. However, that note only refers to SAP S/4 HANA Cloud 2208 and we are in 2408. Just wondering if the Note also applies to newer versions or if there is any secret API call to also get the PO Items marked for Deletion/Blocked.

Thanks a lot in advance!
